prompt:
A rectangular FDM-printable mounting plate, 250 mm long (X) by 80 mm wide
(Y) by 5 mm thick (Z), with 6 mm radius rounded corners. The discharge
end of the plate (X = 0) has a U-shaped notch cut into it, 24 mm deep
along X, 31 mm wide along Y, centred on Y = 0. This notch lets powder
fall straight down past the plate.

The plate has these through-holes for mounting other components from
above (all drilled fully through the 5 mm plate, axes parallel to Z):

  * BRK-D group (auger bracket #1, near the discharge end):
    four 3.4 mm clearance holes for M3 screws in a rectangular pattern,
    38 mm spacing along X and 18 mm spacing along Y, pattern centred on
    (X = 35, Y = 0).
  * TAP group (tap-collar mounting flange):
    four 3.4 mm clearance holes for M3 screws in a rectangular pattern,
    38 mm spacing along X and 18 mm spacing along Y, pattern centred on
    (X = 95, Y = 0).
  * BRK-M group (auger bracket #2, near the motor end):
    four 3.4 mm clearance holes for M3 screws in a rectangular pattern,
    38 mm spacing along X and 18 mm spacing along Y, pattern centred on
    (X = 155, Y = 0).
  * NEMA-17 group (stepper motor mount):
    four 3.4 mm M3 clearance holes on a 31 mm x 31 mm square pattern
    centred on (X = 215, Y = 0), plus a single 22.4 mm diameter pilot
    boss clearance hole through the centre at (X = 215, Y = 0).

Hanging DOWN from the underside of the plate (i.e. solid features
attached to the bottom face, extending toward negative Z), the plate
carries:

  * Two hinge pillars, one at Y = +20.5 and one at Y = -20.5, both
    centred on X = 18. Each pillar is 14 mm along X, 6 mm along Y, and
    extends 24.5 mm downward from the plate underside. Each pillar has a
    5.2 mm horizontal pin hole through its Y-direction face, with the
    pin axis parallel to Y, located 18.5 mm below the plate underside
    so it lies on the auger long axis. The two holes are coaxial — they
    form one continuous hinge pin path.
  * One linear-actuator clevis tab, 16 mm along X, 6 mm along Y, 22 mm
    tall, centred on (X = 73, Y = 0) and extending 22 mm downward from
    the plate underside. It has a single 5.2 mm horizontal clevis pin
    hole through its Y face, 5 mm down from the top of the tab.

The part must print flange-up (top face of the plate on the build plate)
with the hinge pillars and clevis tab as overhangs handled by tree
supports. All other features print without supports. Output a single
solid body (the plate, pillars, and tab fused together) — return STEP
and STL.

design_plan.description: FDM-printable rectangular mounting plate (250×80×5 mm) with rounded corners, U-shaped discharge notch, multiple M3 clearance hole patterns for component mounting, and three downward-extending support features (two hinge pillars and one clevis tab) with horizontal pin holes.
components: Main rectangular plate with rounded corners
U-shaped discharge notch at X=0 end
BRK-D hole group (4× M3 clearance, rectangular pattern)
TAP hole group (4× M3 clearance, rectangular pattern)
BRK-M hole group (4× M3 clearance, rectangular pattern)
NEMA-17 hole group (4× M3 clearance + 1× central boss clearance)
Two hinge pillars extending downward with coaxial pin holes
One clevis tab extending downward with pin hole

overall_bbox.note: Z spans from plate top (0) to bottom of hinge pillars (-24.5), total 5 + 24.5 = 29.5 mm

constraints.volume_breakdown: Plate: ~95000 mm³, Pillars: ~4116 mm³, Clevis: ~2112 mm³, minus holes/notch: ~11000 mm³
constraints.hole_breakdown: 13× through-holes (3.4 mm dia) + 1× boss clearance (22.4 mm dia) + 3× pin holes (5.2 mm dia)
constraints.symmetry: Bilateral symmetry about XZ plane (Y=0): U-notch, all mounting groups, clevis tab centered; hinge pillars mirrored at Y=±20.5
constraints.manufacturing: FDM printable, flange-up orientation, tree supports for underside features
constraints.coordinate_system: Plate top surface at Z=0, features extend to Z=-24.5 mm, X=0 is discharge end

design_plan.notes: CRITICAL: All Z coordinates: plate top = 0, plate bottom = -5, pillars extend to -29.5, clevis to -27. Hinge pin holes at Z=-23.5 (18.5 below plate bottom). Clevis pin at Z=-10 (5 below clevis top). U-notch centered at Y=0, cuts from X=0 to X=24. Rounded corners apply to main plate perimeter only. Ensure coaxial alignment of two hinge pillar pin holes (both parallel to Y-axis, same Z height). All through-holes are fully penetrating the 5mm plate thickness. NEMA-17 pattern is square (31×31 mm), others rectangular (38×18 mm). Generate single fused solid body. Export STEP and STL.

checks.message: All constraints met. The plate dimensions are correct: 250mm (X) × 80mm (Y) × 5mm (Z) with the total Z extent of 29.5mm accounting for the 5mm plate plus 24.5mm hinge pillars extending downward. The U-shaped notch at the discharge end is visible in the rendered views. The rendered images confirm: (1) All 17 through-holes are present - 16 M3 clearance holes in the four mounting groups (BRK-D, TAP, BRK-M, NEMA-17) plus the central 22.4mm NEMA-17 boss hole visible in the center/top-angle view. (2) The hinge pillars are visible hanging below the plate at the discharge end. (3) The clevis tab is visible extending downward from the plate center. The bounding box confirms proper geometry with X=250mm, Y=80mm. The volume of ~101,608 mm³ is plausible for the solid plate minus notch and holes, plus the pillar/tab extensions. The filleted corners are present. The part is a single fused solid body as required.

validation.feedback_text: All checks passed. The generated geometry meets all constraints.

iterations.feedback_sent: All checks passed. The generated geometry meets all constraints.
